;W[fg]C[RIGHT You won by 1, the best result. The 1 space jump (1sj) allows a 1 point win, the large monkey jump (lmj) only allows jigo; the other 1st move options are inferior to lmj. After 1sj (with the ko threats larger than in 3844, and the gote move not too big) if black offers the E/F11 ko with F11, white can get a better result than the solution by replying at G10. This leaves black with only 1 good strategy: to play 1sj, force the E10/11 ko by playing G10, and then to let white save the capture at F5.])
